name: dashboard-v3
description: PC端营销数据 Dashboard — Exness/Vantage C-Level 管理层

scripts.start: docker compose up -d && sleep 2 && cd apps/backend && pnpm prisma studio --port 5555 & concurrently -n FE,BE -c cyan,green "cd apps/frontend && pnpm run dev" "cd apps/backend && pnpm run dev"
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/backend && pnpm prisma migrate dev
